examples.title: Pseudocode: Artificial Neuron
examples.description: Computes the output of an artificial neuron
examples.code:
ALGORITHM ArtificialNeuron
INPUT: inputs (x1, x2, ..., xn), weights (w1, w2, ..., wn), bias (b)
OUTPUT: output (y)

BEGIN
 z = 0
 FOR i FROM 1 TO n DO
 z = z + wi * xi
 END FOR
 z = z + b
 y = f(z) // apply activation function
 RETURN y
END
examples.explanation: This pseudocode demonstrates how an artificial neuron computes its output through weighted summation and activation.

examples.title: Python: Artificial Neuron
examples.description: Implements an artificial neuron with sigmoid activation function
examples.explanation: This Python implementation demonstrates how to compute the output of an artificial neuron using the sigmoid activation function.
